tasks.label: Upload + Monitor (Safe)
args: set -e; echo "[Task] Resolving PlatformIO CLI..."; PIO="$(command -v pio || true)"; if [ -z "$PIO" ] && [ -x "$HOME/.platformio/penv/bin/pio" ]; then PIO="$HOME/.platformio/penv/bin/pio"; fi; if [ -z "$PIO" ]; then echo "PlatformIO CLI not found. Install with: pip install platformio"; exit 127; fi; echo "[Task] Using: $PIO"; echo "[Task] Uploading firmware..."; "$PIO" run --target upload; echo "[Task] Starting serial monitor (Ctrl+C to stop)..."; "$PIO" device monitor --baud 115200

tasks.label: Upload + Monitor (60s)
args: set -e; echo "[Task] Resolving PlatformIO CLI..."; PIO="$(command -v pio || true)"; if [ -z "$PIO" ] && [ -x "$HOME/.platformio/penv/bin/pio" ]; then PIO="$HOME/.platformio/penv/bin/pio"; fi; if [ -z "$PIO" ]; then echo "PlatformIO CLI not found. Install with: pip install platformio"; exit 127; fi; echo "[Task] Using: $PIO"; echo "[Task] Uploading firmware..."; "$PIO" run --target upload; echo "[Task] Starting serial monitor for 60s..."; timeout 60 "$PIO" device monitor --baud 115200 || true; echo "[Task] Monitor stopped after 60s."
